title: SLAMD Performance Dashboard
description: SLAMD LDAP load test results overview

list.name: op_type
list.label: Operation Type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT op_type FROM slamd_op_summary ORDER BY op_type

list.name: server_addr
list.label: Server Address
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(COALESCE(params->'params'->>'Directory Server Address', params->'params'->>'Server Addresses and Ports'), ':', 1) AS addr FROM slamd_job_params WHERE COALESCE(params->'params'->>'Directory Server Address', params->'params'->>'Server Addresses and Ports') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY addr

list.name: job_id
list.label: Job
list.query: SELECT r.job_id AS __value, r.job_description || ' (' || string_agg(DISTINCT s.op_type, ', ' ORDER BY s.op_type) || ') ' || r.job_id AS __text FROM slamd_run r JOIN slamd_op_summary s ON r.job_id = s.job_id WHERE s.op_type IN (${op_type:singlequote}) GROUP BY r.job_id, r.job_description, r.start_time ORDER BY r.start_time DESC

targets.rawSql: SELECT r.job_id, r.job_type, r.job_description, r.current_state, to_char(r.start_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS start_time, to_char(r.stop_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS stop_time, r.duration_seconds, s.op_type, s.total_count, s.tps, s.avg_latency_ms, s.std_dev, ROUND((s.success_rate * 100)::numeric, 2) AS success_pct, p.params FROM slamd_run r JOIN slamd_op_summary s ON r.job_id = s.job_id LEFT JOIN slamd_job_params p ON r.job_id = p.job_id WHERE r.start_time >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AND r.start_time <= ($__timeTo()::timestamptz AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AND s.op_type IN (${op_type:singlequote}) AND (split_part(COALESCE(p.params->'params'->>'Directory Server Address', p.params->'params'->>'Server Addresses and Ports'), ':', 1) IN (${server_addr:singlequote}) OR p.params IS NULL) ORDER BY r.start_time DESC, s.op_type

SELECT * FROM (SELECT to_char(r.start_time, 'MM/DD HH24:MI') AS job_label, s.tps, s.total_count, s.avg_latency_ms, s.std_dev, ROUND((s.success_rate * 100)::numeric, 2) AS success_pct, s.op_type, r.job_type, r.job_description, r.current_state, to_char(r.start_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS start_time, to_char(r.stop_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS stop_time, r.duration_seconds, r.start_time AS sort_time FROM slamd_run r JOIN slamd_op_summary s ON r.job_id = s.job_id LEFT JOIN slamd_job_params p ON r.job_id = p.job_id WHERE r.start_time >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AND r.start_time <= ($__timeTo()::timestamptz AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AND s.op_type IN (${op_type:singlequote}) AND (split_part(COALESCE(p.params->'params'->>'Directory Server Address', p.params->'params'->>'Server Addresses and Ports'), ':', 1) IN (${server_addr:singlequote}) OR p.params IS NULL) ORDER BY r.start_time DESC LIMIT 20) t ORDER BY t.sort_time ASC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT to_char(r.start_time, 'MM/DD HH24:MI') AS job_label, s.avg_latency_ms, s.total_count, s.tps, s.std_dev, ROUND((s.success_rate * 100)::numeric, 2) AS success_pct, s.op_type, r.job_type, r.job_description, r.current_state, to_char(r.start_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS start_time, to_char(r.stop_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS stop_time, r.duration_seconds, r.start_time AS sort_time FROM slamd_run r JOIN slamd_op_summary s ON r.job_id = s.job_id LEFT JOIN slamd_job_params p ON r.job_id = p.job_id WHERE r.start_time >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AND r.start_time <= ($__timeTo()::timestamptz AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AND s.op_type IN (${op_type:singlequote}) AND (split_part(COALESCE(p.params->'params'->>'Directory Server Address', p.params->'params'->>'Server Addresses and Ports'), ':', 1) IN (${server_addr:singlequote}) OR p.params IS NULL) ORDER BY r.start_time DESC LIMIT 20) t ORDER BY t.sort_time ASC
SELECT ROUND((s.success_rate * 100)::numeric, 2) AS success_pct FROM slamd_op_summary s WHERE s.job_id = '${job_id}' AND s.op_type IN (${op_type:singlequote})

SELECT b.bucket_name || ' (' || ROUND(SUM(b.count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(b.count)) OVER(), 0), 2) || '%)' AS bucket_name, SUM(b.count) AS count FROM slamd_op_bucket b WHERE b.job_id = '${job_id}' AND b.bucket_kind = 'response_time' AND b.op_type IN (${op_type:singlequote}) GROUP BY b.bucket_name ORDER BY CASE b.bucket_name WHEN 'Less Than 1ms' THEN 1 WHEN 'Between 1ms and 2ms' THEN 2 WHEN 'Between 2ms and 3ms' THEN 3 WHEN 'Between 3ms and 4ms' THEN 4 WHEN 'Between 4ms and 5ms' THEN 5 WHEN 'Between 5ms and 10ms' THEN 6 WHEN 'Between 10ms and 20ms' THEN 7 WHEN 'Between 20ms and 30ms' THEN 8 WHEN 'Between 30ms and 50ms' THEN 9 WHEN 'Between 50ms and 100ms' THEN 10 WHEN 'Between 100ms and 1000ms' THEN 11 WHEN '1s or More' THEN 12 ELSE 999 END

SELECT b.bucket_name, SUM(b.count) AS count FROM slamd_op_bucket b WHERE b.job_id = '${job_id}' AND b.bucket_kind = 'response_time' AND b.op_type IN (${op_type:singlequote}) GROUP BY b.bucket_name ORDER BY CASE b.bucket_name WHEN 'Less Than 1ms' THEN 1 WHEN 'Between 1ms and 2ms' THEN 2 WHEN 'Between 2ms and 3ms' THEN 3 WHEN 'Between 3ms and 4ms' THEN 4 WHEN 'Between 4ms and 5ms' THEN 5 WHEN 'Between 5ms and 10ms' THEN 6 WHEN 'Between 10ms and 20ms' THEN 7 WHEN 'Between 20ms and 30ms' THEN 8 WHEN 'Between 30ms and 50ms' THEN 9 WHEN 'Between 50ms and 100ms' THEN 10 WHEN 'Between 100ms and 1000ms' THEN 11 WHEN '1s or More' THEN 12 ELSE 999 END

SELECT b.bucket_name, SUM(b.count) AS count FROM slamd_op_bucket b WHERE b.job_id = '${job_id}' AND b.bucket_kind = 'result_code' AND b.op_type IN (${op_type:singlequote}) GROUP BY b.bucket_name ORDER BY SUM(b.count) DESC
